summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Dra. Eliane Costa landing page. All core features working correctly including visual effects, button functionality, and responsive design.

design_issues.issue: Shimmer animation may not be fully visible during automated testing
design_issues.notes: CSS animation is properly defined but difficult to verify programmatically

All 4 buttons are functional and clickable
WhatsApp button links to correct domain

PUNK CROSSFIT button links to correct domain
Mounjaro button links to correct domain
